agreement.full_name: Preferential Trade Agreement between Uzbekistan and Pakistan

notes: Confirmed selective_concession family per Schema Companion Guide's Uzbekistan example. Base_Rate column (D) holds compound text like 'CD 20%, but not less than USD 0.20/kg' -> loads to tariff_lines.mfn_text verbatim (mfn_kind='compound'); Preferential_Rate column (E) holds the CONCESSION MECHANISM as text ('20% decrease in CD', '100% decrease in CD') -> this is concession_type/concession_pct territory per schema Section 5, not a plain rate_value; Tariff_Advantage column (F) holds the OUTCOME ('CD 16%, but not less than USD 0.16/kg', '0% duty') -> maps to tariff_rates.outcome_text. FLAGGED: parsing 'X% decrease in CD' into a clean concession_pct number, and distinguishing which duty component (CD/ACD/RD) each row's concession applies to, requires a dedicated selective_concession format handler (not yet built - this is Step 7+ handler work) rather than the generic column-copy the config alone can express. This config documents WHERE the source text lives; the parsing LOGIC is deferred to that handler.
